title: "Research Projects"

  <img src="/images/haleakala.webp">
  <img src="/images/grandcanyon.webp">
</div>

<!-- RIGHT COLUMN -->
<div class="second-image-column"></div>

[📄 Command-Control vs. Market Incentive Policies in Non-point Source Pollution](research_papers/Ch1 - Command-Control Versus Market Incentive Policies for.pdf)
